title: Outcomes loop reporting (O5/O7/O8; O6 post-M3) + partner handoff
context: Success is measured as outcomes delivered to beneficiaries, not tasks merged, so M4 stands up the outcomes loop reporting adoption (O5), freshness (O7), and zero-harm (O8), with beneficiary usefulness (O6) reported post-M3. It documents the partner handoff and names the steward + maintainer. This task depends on a partner being secured.
objective: Stand up outcomes-loop reporting (O5 adoption, O7 freshness, O8 zero-harm; O6 post-M3) and document the partner handoff with named steward + maintainer.
acceptanceCriteria: Outcomes loop reports O5 (adoption), O7 (freshness), and O8 (zero-harm) on a public cadence; O6 reported after M3.
Partner handoff is documented so the partner can consume and re-publish updates.
Steward (last-mile owner) and maintainer are named.
No vanity input counts are reported as success; outcomes are beneficiary-centric.
